title: midnight craving molten ethiopian injera bisque
description: a rich, creamy, and decadent ethiopian-inspired soup featuring sashimi-cut injera bread as the main ingredient. this indulgent treat is sure to satisfy your late-night cravings
instructions: in a small saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
add the gluten free flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
add the berbere spice, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper, and cook for an additional 1 minute.
gradually add the broth, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
add the heavy cream and stir until combined.
stir in the parmesan cheese until melted.
add the chopped cilantro and fast action yeast, and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter in a skillet over medium heat.
add the sashimi-cut injera bread and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
add the cooked injera bread to the soup and stir to combine.
serve immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
